title: SlyLog / Shadow vs OEM
description: Our controller's would-be demands ([shadow] telemetry, TX disabled) overlaid on the OEM stat's real CT-485 demands (#139). OEM pct = value byte / 2.

target.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, kind || ' ' || coalesce(detail->>'cmd','') AS text, kind AS tags FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND kind IN ('cycle_start','cycle_stop')

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, get_byte(payload, 3) / 2.0 AS "OEM cool" FROM raw_frames WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND msg_type = 3 AND length(payload) >= 4 AND get_byte(payload, 1) = 0 AND get_byte(payload, 0) = 101 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ts AS time, get_byte(payload, 3) / 2.0 AS "OEM heat" FROM raw_frames WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND msg_type = 3 AND length(payload) >= 4 AND get_byte(payload, 1) = 0 AND get_byte(payload, 0) = 100 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ts AS time, get_byte(payload, 4) / 2.0 AS "OEM fan" FROM raw_frames WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND msg_type = 3 AND length(payload) >= 5 AND get_byte(payload, 1) = 0 AND get_byte(payload, 0) = 102 ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, cool_pct AS "shadow cool", greatest(gas_pct, hp_pct) AS "shadow heat", fan_pct AS "shadow fan" FROM shadow_demands WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1

WITH oem AS (SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 minute', ts, $__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS m, locf(avg(get_byte(payload, 3) / 2.0)) AS pct FROM raw_frames WHERE msg_type = 3 AND length(payload) >= 4 AND get_byte(payload, 1) = 0 AND get_byte(payload, 0) = 101 AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1), sh AS (SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 minute', ts, $__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS m, locf(avg(cool_pct)) AS pct FROM shadow_demands WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1) SELECT round(avg(abs(coalesce(o.pct, 0) - coalesce(s.pct, 0)))::numeric, 2) AS "mean |Δ| %", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(o.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(s.pct, 0) = 0) AS "OEM only min", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(s.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(o.pct, 0) = 0) AS "shadow only min", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(o.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(s.pct, 0) > 0) AS "both on min" FROM oem o JOIN sh s USING (m)

WITH oem AS (SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 minute', ts, $__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS m, locf(avg(get_byte(payload, 3) / 2.0)) AS pct FROM raw_frames WHERE msg_type = 3 AND length(payload) >= 4 AND get_byte(payload, 1) = 0 AND get_byte(payload, 0) = 100 AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1), sh AS (SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 minute', ts, $__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS m, locf(avg(greatest(gas_pct, hp_pct))) AS pct FROM shadow_demands WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1) SELECT round(avg(abs(coalesce(o.pct, 0) - coalesce(s.pct, 0)))::numeric, 2) AS "mean |Δ| %", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(o.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(s.pct, 0) = 0) AS "OEM only min", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(s.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(o.pct, 0) = 0) AS "shadow only min", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(o.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(s.pct, 0) > 0) AS "both on min" FROM oem o JOIN sh s USING (m)

WITH oem AS (SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 minute', ts, $__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS m, locf(avg(get_byte(payload, 4) / 2.0)) AS pct FROM raw_frames WHERE msg_type = 3 AND length(payload) >= 5 AND get_byte(payload, 1) = 0 AND get_byte(payload, 0) = 102 AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1), sh AS (SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 minute', ts, $__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS m, locf(avg(fan_pct)) AS pct FROM shadow_demands WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1) SELECT round(avg(abs(coalesce(o.pct, 0) - coalesce(s.pct, 0)))::numeric, 2) AS "mean |Δ| %", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(o.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(s.pct, 0) = 0) AS "OEM only min", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(s.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(o.pct, 0) = 0) AS "shadow only min", count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(o.pct, 0) > 0 AND coalesce(s.pct, 0) > 0) AS "both on min" FROM oem o JOIN sh s USING (m)

panels.title: COOL cycle-start pairing — shadow start vs nearest OEM start (±60 min)

targets.rawSql: WITH sh AS (SELECT ts, cool_pct, lag(cool_pct) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev FROM shadow_demands WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)), starts AS (SELECT ts FROM sh WHERE cool_pct > 0 AND coalesce(prev, 0) = 0) SELECT s.ts AS "shadow start", e.ts AS "nearest OEM start", round((extract(epoch FROM e.ts - s.ts) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "offset min (+ = OEM later)" FROM starts s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT ts FROM events WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND detail->>'cmd' = 'COOL_DEMAND' AND ts BETWEEN s.ts - interval '60 minutes' AND s.ts + interval '60 minutes' ORDER BY abs(extract(epoch FROM ts - s.ts)) LIMIT 1) e ON true ORDER BY s.ts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Shadow fused temp & setpoints (+ would-be action)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, fused_temp_c AS "fused T", set_heat_c AS "setH", set_cool_c AS "setC" FROM shadow_demands WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1
